title: MetaplusDoc
description: Canonical document envelope that separates stable identity, source-aligned metadata, derived enrichments, and operational info.

idea.title: Idea
idea.description: Stable identity section containing FQMN and its decomposed parts.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Source-aligned metadata synchronized from authoritative systems.

plus.title: Plus
plus.description: Derived, human-authored, or AI-generated enrichments kept separate from source facts.

info.title: Info
info.description: Operational bookkeeping for storage identifiers and version tracking.
